title: Minimum Interval To Include Each Query
description: For each query independently, return the length of the smallest inclusive interval containing it, or -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: intervals: list[list[int]], queries: list[int]. 1 <= intervals,queries lengths <=100000; endpoints and query values <=1e7; intervals are inclusive and queries may repeat.
output_contract: Return integer[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
